content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

December 20, 2005

David J. Doherty, CEO
Stanfield Systems Incorporated
718 Sutter Street, Suite 108
Folsom, CA 95630-2561

Re: Your Request for Advice
File No. W-05-253

Dear Mr. Doherty:

Thank you for your general concerns regarding Stanfield Systems, and the 21st Century Project.

Regulation 18329(b)(8)(D) provides that the Commission may decline to provide advice where the request does not present a question under the Political Reform Act. (See also, regulation 18329(c)(4)(F), copy enclosed.) You have not provided sufficient information for us to advise you under the Act. Since your letter appears to concern topics not covered by the Act, we would not be the agency to respond to your request.

Should you have any questions, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

John Wallace
Assistant General Counsel

Enclosures
